AI is moving fast. Let's get you ready.

I've spent 20 years building technology at the highest levels — Microsoft, Intel, and now as an advisor to companies figuring out what AI means for them. I can help you too.

Book a free call →
20+ years Leading tech at scale

Here's what I've learned.

Every company I talk to is in the same place. They know AI matters. They've read the headlines. They've probably bought a tool or two. But when I ask them "what's your AI strategy?" — I get blank stares.

That's not their fault. The market is designed to confuse you. Every vendor promises magic. Every consultant has a framework. And somehow, after all that money and time, nothing changes.

"I don't want to sell you AI. I want to help you figure out if AI should even be on your roadmap right now — and if so, where it actually moves the needle."

I work with a handful of companies each quarter. Not because I'm exclusive, but because this work requires attention. I need to understand your business, your constraints, your team. Then I give you a plan that makes sense for where you actually are.

How we can work together

AI Strategy Sprint

Two weeks to get clarity. We assess, prioritize, and build your roadmap. You leave with a plan you can execute.

$25,000

Executive Coaching

Monthly 1:1s for leaders who need to understand AI well enough to make decisions. No coding required.

$5,000/month

Board Advisory

Ongoing guidance for leadership teams navigating AI investment and strategy decisions.

$10,000/month

Ready when you are. No pressure.

Book a 30-minute call. We'll talk about where you are, where you're trying to go, and whether I can help. If not, I'll point you to someone who can.
